# VESA Enterprise Inc

VESA Enterprise Inc is an apparel sourcing partner for global retailers, importers, brands and buyer liaison offices.

Website: https://www.vesaent.com/
Email: info@vesaent.com
Company LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/vesaenterprise/
Founder LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/venkategenva

## What VESA does

VESA supports apparel product development, factory sourcing, production management, quality assurance and supply chain execution across Bangladesh and India.

## Geographic focus

- Bangladesh apparel production and FOB Chittagong sourcing support
- India apparel sourcing, product development and category support

## Product focus

VESA focuses on garments and apparel only. It does not position itself for bags, footwear, leather goods, accessories, industrial products or home textiles.

## Buyer types

VESA supports global retailers, importers, brands and buyer liaison offices that need a sourcing partner for design-to-delivery garment programs.

## Product categories

Representative garment categories include men’s apparel, ladies’ apparel, kids’ apparel and selected baby garment basics. Examples include tees, polos, woven shirts, shorts, joggers, dresses, skirts, denim basics, casual pants and light activewear.

## EGENVA support

VESA uses EGENVA intelligence as an AI-assisted workflow and decision-support layer for sourcing visibility, supplier intelligence, follow-up discipline and structured communication.

## Compliance note

Compliance route depends on buyer requirement, factory nomination, audit status and final supplier selection. Route support may include buyer-required paths such as Sedex, BSCI, OEKO-TEX or GOTS where applicable.
